stemHtml:
Refer to figure. 
The ECAM display in the annex shows that the slats are deployed, but the flaps are locked and stowed in the up position. Compared to landing with a clean wing, which of the following should the pilot expect when landing in this configuration?

options.a: A lower landing speed because CLMAX is significantly increased. However, the pitch angle will be much higher, necessitating an adapted flare technique.
options.b: The wing's ability to generate lift will increase marginally, but the AoA for CLMAX will be lower because of the wing's less than optimal profile and drooped leading edge.
options.c: Increased landing speed to avoid tailstrike on touchdown. However the drag increase due to leading edge slats will improve speed control and result in a shorter landing distance.
options.d: The airplane will behave the same. The landing attitude will be lower because slats lower the AoA for CLMAX.
